raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX i was delivered an improper delivery of a billing statement from American Express and noticed billing errors on the statement. I do not believe i was given a fair billing error dispute. The adjusted balance at {$1100.00} is incorrect and the new balance at {$1200.00} is incorrect. The issuer, American Express National Bank did not fulfill their obligation by adding the interest rates of APR for Purchases, in which i purchased using the Card for personal, family and household purposes, So interest charged on the statement is {$0.00}, which is a billing error. Same thing with fees I have returned payment ( billing statement ) back to American Express National Bank and did not adjust the fees onto the Account. The Fees on the statements is {$0.00}, So interest charged and fees are COMPUTING ERRORS according to the Fair Credit Billing Act. I am indirectly involved into the Account and if American Express National Bank do not fulfill their obligation and then i am affected and held liable. According to the Fair Credit Billing Act this is a billing error. My name is attached to Part 1 of the Cardmember of the Agreement not Part 2. No where in Part 2 of the Cardmember of the Agreement does it say " I XXXX XXXX promise to pay ''. The issuer is identified on part 2 of the cardmember of the Agreement, not me. I have fulfilled my obligation by using the Card i had applied for. The agreement says American Express National Bank promises to pay all charges. My intention is to operate in good faith and for the Account to be credited. Attached to this is Part 1 and Part 2 of cardmember agreement, Fair Credit Billing Act, My dispute letter, and the response from American Express, billing statement.
